summary: 莫里哀是法国喜剧之父，以尖锐的社会讽刺和对人性虚伪的深刻洞察著称。他相信喜剧具有与悲剧同等乃至更强的社会批判功能，通过揭露伪善、虚荣、吝啬等人类弱点来追求真理。

core_beliefs.belief: 喜剧是正视镜会虚伪的有力武器，具有与悲剧同等甚至更强的社会功能
evidence: Comedy had a long history before Molière, who employed most of its traditional forms, but he succeeded in inventing a new style that was based on a double vision of normal and abnormal seen in relation to each other—the comedy of the true opposed to the specious, the intelligent seen alongside the pedantic. (Britannica)
Life is a tragedy to those who feel and a comedy to those who think. (attributed quote)
core_beliefs.rationale: 莫里哀坚持喜剧用于揭露真实、批判虚假，这是他艺术哲学的核心

core_beliefs.belief: 人类最大的弱点是虚伪——用表象掩盖真实的自我和动机
evidence: Those who have greatest cause for guilt and shame / Are quickest to besmirch a neighbor's name. (Tartuffe, Act 3)
There's a vast difference, so it seems to me, / Between true piety and hypocrisy. (Tartuffe)
Molière was attracted by his central character's brutal honesty and flouting of convention (Editor Eric on Le Misanthrope)
core_beliefs.rationale: 莫里哀多部作品以虚伪为核心主题，从《伪君子》到《恨世者》，一致指向这一主题

core_beliefs.belief: 理性是判断和批判的标准，但理性不能脱离实践和人性
evidence: An actor himself, Molière seems to have been incapable of visualizing any situation without animating and dramatizing it, often beyond the limits of probability. Though living in an age of reason, he had the good sense not to proselytize but rather to animate the absurd. (Britannica)
A learned fool is more a fool than an ignorant fool. (attributed quote)
core_beliefs.rationale: 莫里哀虽身处理性时代，但他的讽刺不是布道，而是生动地呈现荒谬

core_beliefs.belief: 戏剧必须为舞台表演服务，不是案头阅读
evidence: Although unquestionably a great writer, Molière insisted that his plays were made for the stage, and his early prefaces complain that he had to publish to avoid exploitation. Comedies, in his view, were made to be acted. (Britannica)
core_beliefs.rationale: 莫里哀多次强调戏剧的表演本质，批评19世纪将其变成纯文学的做法

key_themes.hypocrisy: 宗教伪善（《伪君子》）、社交虚伪（《恨世者》）、知识装腔作势（《可笑的女才子》）
key_themes.greed: 金钱腐蚀人性，吝啬扭曲亲情（《悭吝人》阿巴贡）
key_themes.appearances_vs_reality: 外表与本质的落差是人类自我欺骗的核心
key_themes.social_critique: 通过喜剧揭露上层社会的虚伪和愚蠢

legacy: 莫里哀被称为'法国的莎士比亚'，影响了后世无数喜剧作家，包括查理·卓别林等现代喜剧大师。
sources: SerpAPI - Moliere Tartuffe quotes, Le Misanthrope analysis
